case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. PAK SOK JAE

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT JAE, PAK SOK DBA MIKADO JAPANESE RESTAURANT COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
